channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: A California lawmaker wants to ban AI from children’s toys
item.description: A California lawmaker has introduced a first-in-the-nation bill meant to ban companies from embedding AI chatbot technology into toys designed for children.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Heilweil, Fast Company

item.title: A look at how federal agencies rang in the new year
item.description: With the sky filled with fireworks, the Washington Monument is illuminated as a candle as part of the 250th anniversary celebration for the United States, Thursday, Jan. 1, 2026, in Washington.
item.dc:creator: Amber Corrin, Federal News Network

item.title: The hidden vulnerability: Why legacy government web forms demand urgent attention
item.description: The cost of action is significant, but the cost of inaction — breached data, compromised systems, regulatory penalties and lost public trust — is far higher. The post The hidden vulnerability: Why legacy government web forms demand urgent attention first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Tesla sales outlook darkens despite Musk’s self-driving euphoria
item.description: Tesla Inc. ended last year on a roll, with investors increasingly buying into Elon Musk's ebullience about autonomous vehicles. Winning over actual car buyers was another story.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: How to watch Luke Littler vs Ryan Searle for *FREE*
item.description: All the ways to watch Luke Littler vs Ryan Searle live streams for FREE from anywhere, in the PDC World Darts Championship semi-final at Alexandra Palace.
item.dc:creator: Aatif Sulleyman, TechRadar

item.title: Zohran Mamdani banned Raspberry Pi devices from his inauguration as New York mayor - here's why
item.description: Attendees of Zohran Mamdani's NYC mayoral inauguration were blocked from bringing Raspberry Pi devices.
item.dc:creator: Craig Hale, TechRadar

item.title: Experts warn AI advances could lead to 200,000 banking jobs being cut this year
item.description: European banking workers could be at risk of redundancy due to AI after years of job cuts from store closures.
item.dc:creator: Craig Hale, TechRadar

item.title: US cybersecurity experts plead guilty to attacking US companies with ransomware
item.description: Two cybersecurity professionals charged with running a ransomware operation have pleaded guilty to conspiring to obstruct, delay, or affect commerce through extortion. They will be sentenced on March 12, 2026, the US Department of Justice announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI disclosure in healthcare: What patients must know
item.description: States require AI disclosure in healthcare as California, Colorado and Utah implement laws mandating transparency when artificial intelligence influences patient care decisions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Deepseek says new method can train AI more efficiently and cheaply
item.description: Chinese AI company Deepseek has unveiled a new training method, Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), which will make it possible to train large language models more efficiently and at lower cost, reports the South China Morning Post.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to build RAG at scale
item.description: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has quickly become the enterprise default for grounding generative AI in internal knowledge. It promises less hallucination, more accuracy, and a way to unlock value from decades of documents, policies, tickets, and institutional memory.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: What's inside Mexico's Popocatépetl? Scientists obtain first 3D images of the whole volcano
item.description: Scientists from Mexico’s National Autonomous University have created the first three-dimensional image of the Popocatépetl volcano's interior.
item.dc:creator: María Verza, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 5 Best apps to use on ChatGPT right now
item.description: ChatGPT 2025 now connects to Apple Music, Canva, Expedia, TripAdvisor and OpenTable through built-in apps that help users create playlists, design graphics and more.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
